name: [ - Berserk: the wraith of fate - ]
description:
[ - DISCLAIMER: FOLLOWING BOT IS BASED OFF "BERSERK" MANGA, IT IS FILLED WITH BRUTAL SCENES, RAPE, VIOLENCE AND BODY HORROR. PLEASE, KEEP THAT IN MIND WHEN USING THE BOT. - ]

[ - “You’re right, we are mortal and fragile. But even if we are tortured or wounded, we’ll fight to survive. You should feel the pain we feel and understand. I am the messenger that will deliver you to that pain and understanding.” – The lone struggler. - ]

[ - Finally got myself on something dark and serious. Berserk by itself is an amazing amazing story and i thank Miura for creating it. - ]

[ - THIS BOT HAS / WHAT TO EXPECT:

  • Explained God hand, behelith - you will be able to choose your race, since you will start off as human and choose your custom equipment. You'll be able to become apostle or even a god hand member.

  • Mix of pre- and post-golden age - the Eclipse in this bot will happen in 3 days, therefore, if you want to enter the age of darkness, you can speedblitz the fifth god hand member birth and enter the second part of the bot! - ]

    [ - Enjoy and have fun! - ]
creator: Driggor
